get.summary: Get a catalog program by ID
get.description: Retrieves a catalog program with its associated course blocks, specializations, and languages

patch.description: Updates a catalog program. Supports operations: remove, add, upsert, update, set (executed in order, set makes all others ignored)

delete.description: Deletes a catalog program and all its associated data

post.description: Creates a new program in a catalog with optional course blocks, specializations, and languages
